meta.source: Web research compilation (ETFinTwit 50, FinTwit community, finance media)
meta.notes: Follower counts are approximate as of early 2026. ETF relevance scored 1-10.

influencers.name: Eric Balchunas
influencers.focus: ETF analysis, fund flows, new ETF launches, regulatory developments
influencers.content_type: Breaking ETF news, data-driven analysis, fund comparisons
influencers.sample_content: NEW: Bitcoin ETF inflows just crossed $50B cumulative. Here's the breakdown by issuer...
influencers.engagement_note: Bloomberg Senior ETF Analyst; the single most influential ETF voice on X. ETFinTwit 50 member. When he tweets, the industry pays attention.

influencers.name: Nate Geraci
influencers.focus: ETF industry trends, new fund launches, ETF education
influencers.content_type: ETF commentary, podcast clips, industry analysis
influencers.sample_content: This week's ETF launches: 12 new active ETFs filed. Here's what stands out...
influencers.engagement_note: President of The ETF Store; host of ETF Prime podcast; essential follow for ETF industry professionals

influencers.name: Meb Faber
influencers.focus: Quantitative investing, global asset allocation, ETF strategies
influencers.content_type: Research threads, contrarian takes, podcast promotion
influencers.sample_content: The US is now 65% of global market cap. History suggests mean reversion. Here's why international ETFs deserve a look...
influencers.engagement_note: Founder of Cambria Investments (ETF issuer); author and podcast host; combines academic rigor with accessible commentary

influencers.name: Morgan Housel
influencers.focus: Behavioral finance, long-term investing philosophy, wealth psychology
influencers.sample_content: The best investment strategy is the one you can stick with for 30 years. That's usually a boring index fund.
influencers.engagement_note: Author of 'The Psychology of Money'; partner at Collaborative Fund; massive reach for investing philosophy

influencers.name: Liz Ann Sonders
influencers.focus: Macro market analysis, economic indicators, equity strategy
influencers.content_type: Charts, macro data commentary, market outlook
influencers.sample_content: Updated: S&P 500 sector rotation showing defensive tilt. Here are the ETF flow implications...
influencers.engagement_note: Chief Investment Strategist at Charles Schwab; highly respected institutional voice with retail crossover

influencers.name: Dave Nadig
influencers.focus: ETF structure, market microstructure, fintech, ETF industry analysis
influencers.content_type: Deep ETF structural analysis, industry commentary
influencers.sample_content: Thread on why ETF premium/discount matters less than you think, and when it really does matter...
influencers.engagement_note: Former CIO at ETF Trends; ETFinTwit 50 member; one of the deepest ETF structural thinkers on the platform

influencers.name: Tom Lydon
influencers.focus: ETF trends, thematic investing, ETF education
influencers.content_type: ETF trend analysis, conference coverage, education
influencers.sample_content: Thematic ETFs saw $2B in inflows last month. AI and clean energy leading the way.
influencers.engagement_note: Former CEO of ETF Trends; veteran ETF industry commentator and conference organizer

influencers.name: Erin Lowry
influencers.focus: Personal finance, investing basics, financial literacy
influencers.content_type: Beginner-friendly finance tips, book promotion, community engagement
influencers.sample_content: Starting to invest? A low-cost target-date fund or a 3-ETF portfolio is all you need.
influencers.engagement_note: Author of 'Broke Millennial' series; strong millennial audience; gateway influencer for new ETF investors

influencers.name: ETF Heathens
influencers.focus: ETF commentary, fund analysis, FinTwit community
influencers.content_type: ETF hot takes, fund comparisons, industry humor
influencers.sample_content: New leveraged single-stock ETF filed today. The ETF wrapper can hold anything now.
influencers.engagement_note: Niche but highly engaged ETF-specific community account; strong ETFinTwit presence

influencers.name: Sam Ro
influencers.focus: Macro economics, stock market analysis, long-term investing
influencers.content_type: Weekly market recaps, charts, economic data breakdowns
influencers.sample_content: Stocks continue to climb the wall of worry. Long-term index investors have been rewarded for staying the course.
influencers.engagement_note: Former Yahoo Finance editor; runs TKer newsletter; data-driven and measured voice

influencers.name: Trung Phan
influencers.focus: Business/finance storytelling, tech investing, market trends
influencers.sample_content: The story of how Vanguard disrupted Wall Street with index funds (thread)
influencers.engagement_note: Viral business storyteller; not ETF-specific but enormous reach among finance-curious audience

influencers.name: Brian Feroldi
influencers.focus: Financial literacy, stock analysis, investing education
influencers.sample_content: How to read an ETF fact sheet in 60 seconds (visual thread)
influencers.engagement_note: Master of visual financial education; threads regularly go viral; co-author of 'Why Does The Stock Market Go Up?'
